message:
feat(engine): add JSON compound placeholder closure verification and update scan assertions

New stdlib_integration test infrastructure for verifying JSON.parse
compound value closure (heap-backed arrays/objects without descriptor
placeholders), including inline artifact emission for CI evidence capture.

Zero placeholder scan integration tests updated to expect 0 open
placeholders now that JSON.parse compound is resolved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
